name: diadem-bench
description: Benchmarks for @devcraft-ts/diadem vs other TypeScript DI containers

scripts.generate: node ../dist/cli.js build --cwd . --scan-dir src/diadem --out src/diadem/generated/manifest.ts && node ../dist/cli.js build --cwd . --scan-dir src/diadem --emit compiled --out src/diadem/generated/container.ts --target-env production
scripts.prep: npm run generate && npm run compile
scripts.all: npm run prep && node dist/run.js && node bundlesize.mjs && node coldstart.mjs
